title: gardenia scabrella
intro: Gardenia scabrella is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Gardenia scabrella or the Wild Gardenia. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Gardenia scabrella include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the digestive system. Herbal preparations of Gardenia scabrella can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using the plant as a tea, which can be used to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties.
